common.orPaste: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
common.footerCopyright: © {year} Douro Bats Padel. All rights reserved.
common.footerTagline: Exclusive padel community · Game nights · Rankings · Draws

verification.subject: Verify Your Email - Douro Bats Padel
verification.preview: Verify your email to complete your Douro Bats Padel registration
verification.heading: Welcome to the Club! 🎾
verification.body1: Thank you for joining Douro Bats Padel! We're excited to have you as part of our exclusive padel community.
verification.body2: To get started and access all features including event registration, draw viewing, and rankings, please verify your email address:
verification.expires: ⏱️ This link will expire in 24 hours
verification.ignore: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset Your Password - Douro Bats Padel
passwordReset.preview: Reset your Douro Bats Padel password
passwordReset.heading: Password Reset Request 🔐
passwordReset.body1: We received a request to reset your password for your Douro Bats Padel account.
passwordReset.body2: Click the button below to create a new password and regain access to your account:
passwordReset.expires: ⏱️ This link will expire in 1 hour
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
passwordReset.security: 🔒 For security reasons, this link can only be used once.

invitation.subject: You're Invited to Join Douro Bats Padel
invitation.preview: You've been invited to join Douro Bats Padel
invitation.heading: You're Invited! 🎾
invitation.body1: {inviterName} has invited you to join Douro Bats Padel, our exclusive padel community.
invitation.body2: Douro Bats Padel is a members-only platform designed for passionate padel players who want to take their game to the next level.
invitation.feature2: 🎲 Automated draw generation for fair matchups
invitation.expires: ⏱️ This invitation will expire in 7 days
invitation.ignore: If you weren't expecting this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

rsvpConfirmation.subject: You're confirmed for {event} - Douro Bats Padel
rsvpConfirmation.heading: You're In!
rsvpConfirmation.bodyWithDate: Great news! You are confirmed for {event} on {date}.
rsvpConfirmation.bodyNoDate: Great news! You are confirmed for {event}.
rsvpConfirmation.body2: Make sure to arrive on time and bring your A-game. See you on the court!
rsvpConfirmation.info: If you can no longer attend, please update your RSVP so another player can take your spot.

waitlist.subject: Waitlisted for {event} - Douro Bats Padel
waitlist.heading: Waitlisted - Position #{position}
waitlist.body1: The event {event} is currently full, but you've been added to the waitlist at position #{position}.
waitlist.body2: If a spot opens up, you'll be automatically promoted and notified. Hang tight!
waitlist.info: You'll receive an email notification if you get promoted to a confirmed spot.

promotion.subject: You're in! Promoted from waitlist - Douro Bats Padel
promotion.preview: You've been promoted from the waitlist for {event}!
promotion.heading: You're In!
promotion.body1: A spot has opened up and you've been promoted from the waitlist for {event}.
promotion.body2: You are now confirmed! Make sure to arrive on time and bring your A-game.
promotion.info: If you can no longer attend, please update your RSVP so another player can take your spot.

drawPublished.subject: Draw published for {event} - Douro Bats Padel
drawPublished.preview: The draw for {event} has been published!
drawPublished.heading: Draw Published
drawPublished.body: The draw for {event} has been published. Check the app to see your court and team assignments.

resultsPublished.subject: Results available for {event} - Douro Bats Padel
resultsPublished.heading: Results Are In!
resultsPublished.body: The results for {event} are now available. Check the app to see scores, rankings updates, and match details.

eventOpen.subject: RSVP now open for {event} - Douro Bats Padel
eventOpen.heading: RSVP Now Open
eventOpen.body: Registration is now open for {event}. Head to the app to confirm your spot before it fills up!
